name: superhuman-agent
description: Superhuman Agent for Callour Studio — one plugin, several senior specialists (Design live; Graphic, Dev, Research coming). Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP; start-task reads a task, brings in the right specialist, and conducts the work to post-comment.

interface.shortDescription: Senior specialist agents for your Superhuman tasks.
interface.longDescription: Superhuman Agent is an umbrella of senior specialists that work your Superhuman Operations tasks. Live today: the Design Agent (Senior Principal UX Designer) — research, IA & sitemap, UX writing, wireframes, design system, visual design, prototyping, building in Figma, and design QA. Coming: Graphic (brand & graphic design), Dev (engineering), and Research (UX & market research). One entry, start-task, reads a task, picks the right specialist, and runs the work; post-comment documents it back. Operational surface only — no finance, sales, or people money. Requires a SUPERHUMAN_MCP_TOKEN env var (ask the founder for a token).
defaultPrompt: Start task <paste a task link> and walk me through it.
What does this task need — which specialist, and what's the plan?
Run the full process on this task.
